description_long: This is a compact, modern rifle with a tactical design, featuring a short barrel and a prominent suppressor attached to the muzzle. The body is constructed primarily from matte black metal and polymer, with a detachable box magazine inserted into the lower receiver. On top, there is a mounted optical sight, likely a red dot or holographic type, and a tactical flashlight or laser module is affixed to the upper rail. The grip is ergonomic, and the stock is integrated into the rear of the receiver, giving the weapon a bullpup-like profile. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters urban operations.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a suppressor, optical sight, and detachable magazine, finished in matte black metal and polymer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, optical sight, tactical module, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock area and the back of the sight system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, grip, and mounted accessories.
